Description.Name: The Trouble With Doubles
Description.Details: You're hit by an unexpected voice as you step onto the Argo's command deck. "You see it too, right, Oliveria? He's right there, mocking me." [[SCN_MW,MechWarrior Coles]] is gesturing at a screen in the Command Center with what looks like the aftermath of a 'Mech battle in a now-decimated town on it. "Darius, what's going on here?" Your XO turns to you and explains. "[[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]] here brought this to my attention, I was just about to to call you to the bridge to discuss it. Essentially, it looks lik-" [[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]] cuts him off impatiently. "I'm being impersonated! You've gotta help me put a stop to this... this identity thief before he ruins my reputation and ComStar's good name!". You muse on the topic for a moment and then look over the devastation on the screen again. Maybe there's something to be done here.

Description.Name: Commit the company to helping take out the imposter.
Help Him Out
Description.Details:
You nod firmly, this kind of wanton destruction has to be dealt with. "[[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]], you've got yourself a deal. I'll help you stop this guy, it's good for our reputation and for our salvage potential." A broad smile covers his face and he barely can contain his appreciation. "Commander, you won't regret this. Let's go get this asshole and put a stop to his marauding."


<b>A unique contract named Taking Out The Trash has been added to the Command Center.

Description.Name: Decline, it's too risky to take on an unknown quantity like this.
Leaves
Description.Details: You shake your head. "I'm sorry, Adam, but this isn't our fight. We can't be taking on every random MechWarrior with an imagined grudge."[[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]] looks disappointed and looks away. "I understand, Commander." You find out in the morning that [[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]] skipped out in the night. A news broadcast comes in later that day from the surface: an unknown MechWarrior was found dead in the wilderness after having stolen a BattleMech. His killers remain at large. You and Darius share a knowing look: [[SCN_MW,{SCN_MW.Callsign}]] isn't coming back.
